title: Error parsing n8n package.json in n8n-import container
symptom: The n8n-import container fails to start with a syntax error related to the package.json file. The file appears to be empty, causing the import process to fail.
not_this_if: The package.json file is valid and contains data
root_cause: The error occurs because the package.json file in the n8n container is empty or corrupted. This prevents the n8n-import process from executing properly, as it relies on the package.json for necessary configurations and dependencies.
fix_steps: Pull the latest n8n Docker image using the command: docker pull n8nio/n8n:latest
Start the n8n-import container separately with: docker compose up -d n8n-import
SSH into the n8n-import container using: docker exec -it n8n-import /bin/sh
Check the contents of the package.json file with: cat /usr/local/lib/node_modules/n8n/package.json
agent_instruction: Pull the latest n8n image and restart the n8n-import container to resolve the package.json issue.
